amenities: Poolside and oceanfront bar and grill (Wave Shack), restaurants (purebeach, pureocean), modern bathrooms, updated kitchens, new furniture, Smart TVs, glass railings on balconies
key_insights: The resort has undergone an extensive, top-to-bottom refresh. The project kicked off in September 2023 and the resort fully reopened as of January 2026. The refresh included both the 14-floor Tower and adjacent villas (Phase 1) and the Beach Towers A, B, C, and D (Phase 2).
